creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 158580
svn patch to tint-devel 20150710

The attached svn patch updates x11/tint-devel to the current git version. The most notable change to the application and the port is the removal of the python based configuration tool. This update was tested with Poudriere on FreeBSD/amd64 8.4, 9.3 and 10.1
